Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/09/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 0.46 % today, the main contract closed at 873.5. The traders' willingness to ship is excellent.The steel mills are active to purchase. The overall trading sentiment of the market is more.
